response.global_analysis:
1. JSON Match: Handled two sequential songs in the performance. Since lyrics were missing from the reference JSON, manual transcription and translation were fully executed.
2. JSON Usage: Discarded the empty reference fields and transcribed directly from the native audio to match the VTubers' vocalizations and character-specific lore.
3. Timing & Pacing: Tightly aligned timestamps to the rapid-fire rap segments (by Fubuki, Mio, Okayu, and Korone) and fast musical transitions, utilizing aggressive truncation where necessary to prevent cascading delays.

subtitles.original: ああ 憂鬱な日々
subtitles.english: Ah, gloomy days...

subtitles.original: 上書きじゃなくって
subtitles.english: Instead of overwriting,

subtitles.original: 名前つけて保存
subtitles.english: save it as a new file.

subtitles.original: どれも全部大事って言い切れる
subtitles.english: I can confidently say they're all precious.

subtitles.original: One for...
subtitles.english: One for...

subtitles.original: みんなのタネが力になる
subtitles.english: Everyone's seeds will become our strength.

subtitles.original: All for...
subtitles.english: All for...

subtitles.original: 今日もにやけすぎるくらい
subtitles.english: Today as well, to the point of smiling too much,

subtitles.original: 笑顔がもう止まらない
subtitles.english: my grin just won't stop.

subtitles.original: 想いは膨らんでいく
subtitles.english: These feelings are swelling up!

subtitles.original: 重ねた今 ぎゅっと噛み締めた
subtitles.english: Reflecting deeply on this moment we've layered together,

subtitles.original: 一人一人違う声で歌えば ほら広がる
subtitles.english: look how it spreads when we sing with our unique voices.

subtitles.original: 風を感じたら まっすぐに
subtitles.english: Once we feel the breeze, straight ahead,

subtitles.original: いくよ（いこう）夢見る空へ
subtitles.english: here I go! (Let's go!) To the dreaming sky!

subtitles.original: 憧れて手を伸ばし
subtitles.english: Longing for it, reaching out my hand,

subtitles.original: 掴みとったその光だ
subtitles.english: that's the light I grasped!

subtitles.original: いつの日か
subtitles.english: Someday...

subtitles.original: また誰かの憧れに変わる
subtitles.english: ...it will change into someone else's aspiration.

subtitles.original: 繋ぐよ
subtitles.english: We'll pass it on!

subtitles.original: 重ねた手はぎゅっと離さずに
subtitles.english: Holding our joined hands tightly without letting go,

subtitles.original: 一人一人違う色で描き出す ときめき
subtitles.english: tracing our excitement, each with our own unique colors.

subtitles.original: 出会ったすべてにありがとう
subtitles.english: Thank you for everything we've met.

subtitles.original: 奇跡だって起こし続け
subtitles.english: Continuing to make even miracles happen,

subtitles.original: ずっとずっとそばにいるよ
subtitles.english: I'll be by your side forever and ever.

subtitles.original: いくよ（いこう）夢見る空へ
subtitles.english: Here I go! (Let's go!) To the dreaming sky!

subtitles.original: ホロライブゲーマーズ！
subtitles.english: Hololive Gamers!

subtitles.original: いくよ！ / フブキングだよー！
subtitles.english: Here we go! / It's Fububking!

subtitles.original: みんなお待たせ！
subtitles.english: Sorry to keep you waiting, everyone!

subtitles.original: We are GAMERS!!!!
subtitles.english: We are GAMERS!!!!

subtitles.original: 楽しむ準備は？ / できてるよね！
subtitles.english: Are you ready to have fun? / You are, right!

subtitles.original: せーの、We are GAMERS!!!!
subtitles.english: Ready, set, We are GAMERS!!!!

subtitles.original: こんこん！
subtitles.english: Konkon!

subtitles.original: はいっ 狐が通ります 白髪ケモ耳白上フブキでーす！
subtitles.english: Yes! A fox is passing through. White-haired, animal ears, it's Shirakami Fubuki!

subtitles.original: 突っ込んじゃって始まらない 君はすこん部に入部しなさい！
subtitles.english: Can't get started without throwing in a retort! You, join the Sukon-bu!

subtitles.original: はい！(イェイ！) はい！(イェイ！)
subtitles.english: Yes! (Yay!) Yes! (Yay!)

subtitles.original: コポコポとお茶どうぞ
subtitles.english: Pour pour, please have some tea.

subtitles.original: ゲームじゃないし 特技はMC
subtitles.english: It's not gaming, my special skill is MCing!

subtitles.original: 明るい やりきる 笑顔が推し！
subtitles.english: Cheerful! Giving it her all! You'll love my smile!

subtitles.original: みおーん！
subtitles.english: Mio-n!

subtitles.original: うち うち うちだよ 大神ミオだよ 黒髪ケモ耳狼ミオ！
subtitles.english: It's me, me, me, I'm Ookami Mio! Black-haired, animal ears, Ookami Mio!

subtitles.original: ツッコミで止めます 霊感も 笑い出すと止まらない ゲラゲラ
subtitles.english: Stopping things with a retort, plus my sixth sense... Once I start laughing, I can't stop! Chuckle, chuckle!

subtitles.original: つまり実はポンってことで どう？
subtitles.english: So in other words, I'm actually a klutz. How's that?

subtitles.original: 立ち位置 セクシー担当
subtitles.english: My position is the sexy one!

subtitles.original: タロット占いで見る未来 ホラゲはやりたくない！
subtitles.english: Reading the future with tarot cards... I don't wanna play horror games!

subtitles.original: 4人そろえば まず最強 君も朝昼晩 ピッタリ
subtitles.english: With the four of us gathered, we're first of all the strongest! You, too, morning, noon, and night, a perfect fit!

subtitles.original: クリアを目指して レベル上げ 今日は 何プレイしよう？
subtitles.english: Aiming to clear, levelling up! What shall we play today?

subtitles.original: 君のハートも 攻略しちゃう 選択をして シミュレーション
subtitles.english: We'll even conquer your heart! Make a choice and simulate!

subtitles.original: 初見もカスタムも 大乱闘 やっぱり ゲームは楽しいね
subtitles.english: First playthroughs, customs, and grand brawls! After all, games are fun!

subtitles.original: G-A-M-E-R-S
subtitles.english: G-A-M-E-R-S

subtitles.original: We are GAMERS!!!!
subtitles.english: We are GAMERS!!!!

subtitles.original: G-A-M-E-R-S
subtitles.english: G-A-M-E-R-S

subtitles.original: おかゆ！
subtitles.english: Okayu!

subtitles.original: いつももぐもぐ猫又おかゆ おにぎり おにぎり はいどうぞ
subtitles.english: Always munching, Nekomata Okayu! Onigiri, onigiri, here you go!

subtitles.original: キラキラフラフラ しょうがない猫だもん ん？ そっか 僕でよくない？
subtitles.english: Sparkling, wandering, can't be helped, after all I'm a cat! Hmm? I see. Isn't it fine if it's me?

subtitles.original: まったりゆっくり 跳ねるリズム 全肯定する おかゆイズム
subtitles.english: Chilled out, slow, bouncing rhythm. Unconditionally accepting Okayu-ism.

subtitles.original: 全肯定コール 準備オッケー？ 毎日僕と一緒に...
subtitles.english: Unconditional acceptance call, ready? Every day together with me...

subtitles.original: ころね！
subtitles.english: Korone!

subtitles.original: おはよー！ゆびゆびー！わぉーん！ わんわんころね 犬神ころね
subtitles.english: Good morning! Yubi yubi! Woof! Woof woof Korone, Inugami Korone!

subtitles.original: キャバリアキングチャールズスパニエル なつくけど凶暴的
subtitles.english: Cavalier King Charles Spaniel, gets attached but is ferocious!

subtitles.original: 訛るイントネーション ワイルドなリアクション まずは指を捧げてくれる？ はい よいしょ！
subtitles.english: Dialect intonation, wild reaction! First, will you offer me your fingers? Yes, yoisho!

subtitles.original: わかったなー？ おかわり地獄オッケー！ 好物のレタスをあげよう お裾分け
subtitles.english: Got it? Refill hell, okay! I'll give you my favorite lettuce to share!
